prompt:
Subject: 
Summer Hat and Sea

Person/Expression: 
Woman in her 20s. Bright ivory-beige fair skin with smooth texture containing a hint of pink flush. Soft highlights on cheeks, nose tip, shoulders, and collarbones, preserving natural skin texture. Pale rose pink blush, champagne beige and pink-brown eyeshadow, long thin lashes, natural tear bags, light brown soft eyebrows, and transparent pink-beige gloss lips. Small clear catchlights in the eyes. Expression is quiet and slightly mature, with lips lightly parted, staring straight at the camera.

Clothing/Pose: 
Hair is milk tea ash brown. Thin see-through bangs, layer cut along the face, medium-long reaching below shoulders. Ends are loosely curled inward, leaving natural bunches and a small amount of stray hairs. Wearing an ecru openwork woven beach hat. Outfit is an ivory crochet bikini with a small gold ring at the chest and a thin ribbon tie on one side of the bottoms. Depicted as an elegant and fashionable swimsuit, without overemphasizing exposure. Sitting on a pale light blue towel on the beach, supporting the body with the left hand behind, and lightly lifting the brim of the hat with the right fingertips. Right knee is raised towards the right side of the screen, with the left leg naturally bent in front. Body shape is healthy, with a natural rounded adult silhouette.

Background/Light: 
Quiet seaside. Background features a pale blue sea, white shimmering waves, distant horizon, and blurred rocks in the back left. Bright sunlight from a sunny summer morning to before noon. Primary light enters from the upper right, casting fine shadows on the face and shoulders through the weave of the hat. Reflected light from the sand softly illuminates the face, neck, collarbones, and arms. White round shimmering bokeh on the sea surface. Overall color scheme is unified with bright ivory, pale beige, light blue, and aqua blue.

Composition/Camera: 
Vertical 4:5. Seaside portrait including from above the knees to the head. Person is slightly left of center, face and hat in the upper center. Composition with the right knee large in the foreground and the gaze leading to the distant sea. Camera is at a slightly lower position than the seated subject, at a natural angle looking up slightly. Focus is on the eyes and hat brim. The sea in the background is softly blurred with a shallow depth of field. Natural telephoto-like compression feel.

Texture/Style: 
Realistic Japanese photography. Cleanliness, transparency, and a natural camera-captured feel like a summer fashion magazine swimsuit portrait. Skin is not overly polished, leaving fine texture and natural highlights. Delicate depiction of fine hair highlights, hat weave, crochet swimsuit thread irregularities, sand grains, towel fibers, and sea surface reflections. Bright and soft tones, natural contrast, clean and smooth photographic texture.

Negative: 
Appearances looking underaged, unnatural face or gaze, facial feature deformation, excessive skin correction, plastic-like skin, extra or missing fingers, fused limbs, broken joints, unnatural leg length, poor contact with hat or swimsuit, floating ribbons, shadows inconsistent with light sources, excessive sexual emphasis, CG feel, illustration feel, 3D rendering feel, excessive HDR, excessive saturation, unnecessary people or objects, garbled text, logos, or watermarks.
